narrative:
01 Ohio Senate district has 231,179 registered voters, with 53.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 36.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.3%, a pronounced Republican lean of 26.0 percentage points. Registration is trending bluer in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean -13.1% D−R vs -32.6% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
